summary: Frontend-only VibeCon SPA tested end-to-end via Playwright against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 3 routes (/, /jobs, /jobs/:jobId) and all 4 JobDetails states (default → accepted → submitted → approved) verified. Navigation, active nav states, code blocks with macOS traffic-light dots, 5 mock job cards, breadcrumb, chat send via button + Enter, 3s auto-transition to approved, reward interpolation, and responsive breakpoints (config-section 1col, links-card column, jobs-grid 1col at ≤768px) all work. No console/page errors observed.
passed_tests: Home: sticky black header, VibeCon logo + dot, Expert/Jobs nav
Home: Expert nav active on /, Jobs inactive
Home: EXPERT SOLVER pill, 'Find an Expert' heading, sampleConfig JSON in dark code-block with macOS traffic-light ::before dots (rgb(255,95,86))
Home: 'Solve the Problems →' CTA navigates to /jobs
Jobs: 'Available Jobs' heading + count badge '5'
Jobs: 5 cards rendered with id, jobName, 'Posted by X', 'N pts'
Jobs: Jobs nav active, Expert inactive on /jobs
Jobs: clicking card navigates to /jobs/:id
Logo click navigates back to /
JobDetails STATE 1: breadcrumb (Jobs / JOB-ID), JOB-ID badge, reward-pill '🏆 750 pts', job title, 'Posted by Sarah', PROBLEM STATEMENT, Accept/Back buttons
Breadcrumb 'Jobs' link and 'Back' button both navigate to /jobs
STATE 2 (accepted): 'Job Accepted' heading + JOB-ID dark badge, 2-col config-section with mockMCPConfig JSON (humanMCP/mcpServers) and prompt containing 'Given job id: JOB-002'
STATE 2: Tunnel Link and Preview URL contain jobId (https://tunnel.vibecon.io/JOB-002, https://preview.vibecon.io/JOB-002)
STATE 2: ChatUI initial 2 messages (poster left flex-start gray bubble, solver right flex-end black bubble) with sender names + timestamps (10:24 AM / 10:26 AM)
Chat: typing + Send button adds solver message and clears input
Chat: Enter key sends message
STATE 3 (submitted): ⏳ icon, 'Thanks for submitting your solution.' heading, 'It is under review. Please wait.' subtext, 3 .loading-dot pulsing dots
STATE 3 → STATE 4 automatic transition after ~3s
STATE 4 (approved): ✅ icon, 'Job Approved!' heading, reward-inset with 🎉 / 'REWARD POINTS CREDITED' / '+750 pts'
STATE 4: 'Browse More Jobs' button navigates to /jobs
Non-existent jobId shows 'Job Not Found' card
Responsive ≤768px: jobs-grid becomes 1 column (358px), config-section becomes 1 column, links-card flex-direction becomes column
